name: Yorkshire Pudding II
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450°F.
2. If necessary, add enough oil to beef drippings to make 2 tablespoons.
3. Spoon drippings into a 15-½" x 10-½" x 2-inch roasting pan.
4. Brush drippings over the bottom and sides of the pan.
5. Set the pan in the oven to get hot before adding batter.
6. In a large mixing bowl, beat eggs and milk together.
7. Add flour and salt; if desired, beat in half teaspoon dried basil, chervil, marjoram, rosemary, or thyme.
8. Beat until the mixture is smooth.
9. Pour batter into the prepared roasting pan.
10. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until done.
11. Immediately cut into squares to serve.
